metadata.review_only_rule: priority expert-label local-evidence gaps are non-countable repair lanes until explicit local mechanistic evidence and external review resolution clear the factory gates

rows.review_policy: local-evidence gap rows are evidence-repair work only; they cannot become countable labels without explicit local mechanistic evidence, external review resolution, and a passing label-factory gate
